content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed yellow center line visible curving rightward, and the car appears to be on the left side of the track following the curve southward.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 97, target index = (97+5) % 121 = 102
- WP102: x=1.0639, y=1.8122
- Car: x=1.1556, y=2.2986, heading=-80.97°
- dy = 1.8122 - 2.2986 = -0.4864
- dx = 1.0639 - 1.1556 = -0.0917
- bearing = atan2(-0.4864, -0.0917): both negative, third quadrant
  - ref angle = atan(0.4864/0.0917) = atan(5.304) ≈ 79.3°
  - bearing = -(180° - 79.3°) = -100.7°
- delta = -100.7° - (-80.97°) = -19.73° → **RIGHT**

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.381m
- distance_from_center = 0.1885m (left of center)
- edge_distance = 0.381 - 0.1885 = 0.1925m → **< 0.20m, close to left edge**
- Steering right (negative) = away from left edge → allowed

|delta| = 19.73°: speed=1.5, steering=-10 to -15. Edge close but steering away.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead, car is 0.19m from left edge with delta=-19.7° requiring right steering to follow waypoint line south; steering away from left edge so boundary check allows it.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track total 121 waypoints, ~17.7m length.",
    "WP0-20: long straight along y≈0.683 heading east.",
    "WP24-44: left curve from east to west, requires sustained positive steering.",
    "WP44-55: straight westward along y≈2.77.",
    "WP82-96: sharp south/southeast curve — large positive delta, need max left steering.",
    "WP92-102: heading ~-65° to -90°, track curves sharply right (south), delta around -20 to -27°.",
    "Car consistently left of center (~0.19-0.22m) in WP96-97 region — edge_distance ~0.16-0.19m.",
    "After WP102, track continues curving south then southwest toward WP105-110.",
    "Prefer -10 to -15 steering at 1.5 speed when |delta|~20° and edge_distance ~0.19m.",
    "Boundary check: steer away from left edge always allowed even when edge_distance < 0.20m."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [1.163, 1.168, 1.166, 1.156],
    "y": [2.504, 2.440, 2.380, 2.299],
    "heading": [-64.747, -68.831, -73.417, -80.969]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP102 at (1.064, 1.812): bearing≈-100.7°, delta≈-19.7° → right correction needed.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -10.0
}
```
